creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #21)

I am unable to build WebEngine-5 at all on any release anymore, so I can no longer test the qt5 variation, the qt6 variation tho, that runs very well at the moment. I think the previous sluggishness may have resulted from pkg updates between 14 and 15.
